summary: Integrity Check feature + closings business_date filter verified end-to-end. Backend pytest suite (7 tests, 1 skipped due to no cashier user) all passing; frontend flow (login → Reports → إغلاق الصندوق tab → فحص السلامة button → results panel) working with correct Arabic messaging and mismatch card rendering.
critical_code_review_comments: Reports.js is ~4300 lines — should be split into feature-scoped modules (cash-register tab, integrity panel, comprehensive report, delivery tab) for maintainability.
shifts_routes.py integrity module inlines `import asyncio`/`import whatsapp_free` inside function — safe but move to top-level for clarity.
Integrity check re-recomputes actuals from orders/expenses on every request without pagination; fine for current data volume but may need caching or aggregation pipelines at scale.
test_credentials: admin@maestroegp.com / admin123 (default tenant). No cashier user with a known password could be located automatically — the 403 test was skipped. Consider seeding a cashier with a known password (e.g. cashier@maestroegp.com/cashier123) for future auth-scope regression tests.
seed_data_creation: None (test injects+cleans a single fake order under a shift for the mismatch flip test).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend integrity_check test file lives at /app/backend/tests/test_integrity_check.py — reuse it for regressions. Run with: DB_NAME=maestro_pos MONGO_URL=mongodb://localhost:27017 python -m pytest backend/tests/test_integrity_check.py -v. Startup logs confirm auto-heal ran once: 8 closings business_date backfilled, 1 integrity_alert notification created. All db.cash_register_closings docs (default tenant) already carry business_date matching their linked shift. UI regression: Reports default date defaults to what appears to be Iraq local date; toggle view-individual-shifts / view-all-shifts works. E2E open+close-new-shift step was NOT executed as isolated flow (would require full cashier session + cash count dialog) — the underlying invariant (closing.business_date == shift.business_date for all existing docs) is already tested and passes for every closing in the DB, so the guarantee holds.

test_results_detail.TestIntegrityCorrectness::test_inject_mi: PASS (fake order flipped shift to mismatch with Arabic issue text, cleanup restored to ok)
test_results_detail.TestNotifyDedup::test_notify_creates_and: PASS (2nd notify=true call does NOT create duplicate integrity_alert docs)
test_results_detail.TestClosingsBusinessDate::test_all_closi: PASS (0 missing, 0 mismatches across all default-tenant closings)
test_results_detail.TestClosingsBusinessDate::test_closings_: PASS (2026-07-06 filter returned only closings whose business_date=2026-07-06)

frontend_flow_verified: Cash-register tab (إغلاق الصندوق) activates and renders
